name: example-clone-nexu
title: Clone Nexu
description: Clone the Nexu marketing site — Geist type, clean product-led homepage.

description_i18n.en: Clone the Nexu marketing site — Geist type, clean product-led homepage.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻 Nexu 官网 —— Geist 字体、干净的产品导向首页。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 復刻 Nexu 官網 —— Geist 字型、乾淨的產品導向首頁。

query.en: Clone this website faithfully: https://nexu.io. Use the web-clone workflow — recon the site, harvest its real fonts and images, match its exact colors and scroll feel, then build a local clone. Keep the original assets; record trademarks/copyright in NOTES.md for me to replace.
query.zh-CN: 忠实复刻这个网站：https://nexu.io。走 web-clone 流程 —— 侦察站点、抓取真实字体与图片、照抄精确色值与滚动体感，再构建本地复刻。保留原始素材；把商标/版权项记进 NOTES.md 交我替换。
